name: USS Waldron (DD 699)
events: 26 Sep 1944 With her shakedown at Bermuda completed USS Waldron departed from New York bound for the Pacific.
1 Oct 1944 USS Waldron transits the Panama Canal.
12 Oct 1944 USS Waldron arrived at San Pedro, California.
14 Oct 1944 USS Waldron departed from San Pedro, California bound for Pearl Harbor.
20 Oct 1944 USS Waldron arrived at Pearl Harbor.
17 Dec 1944 USS Waldron departed from Pearl Harbor bound for Ulithi.
28 Dec 1944 USS Waldron arrived at Ulithi.
30 Dec 1944 USS Waldron departed from Ulithi with TF 38.
26 Jan 1945 USS Waldron returns to Ulithi.
10 Feb 1945 USS Waldron departed from Ulithi with TF 58.
18 Feb 1945 USS Waldron damaged her bow when she rams a Japanese guard boat of the Bonin Islands in position 29°27'N, 141°34'E. Waldron was detached to Saipan to make repairs to her bow the same day.
20 Feb 1945 USS Waldron arrived at Saipan.
23 Feb 1945 With her bow repaired USS Waldron departed from Saipan to rejoin the fleet off Iwo Jima.
4 Mar 1945 USS Waldron returns to Ulithi.
14 Mar 1945 USS Waldron departed from Ulithi with TF 38 to support the Okinawa landings.
1 Jun 1945 USS Waldron arrived at San Pedro Bay, Philippines.
1 Jul 1945 USS Waldron departed from San Pedro Bay, Philippines with TF 38.
10 Sep 1945 USS Waldron enters Tokyo Bay.
